docs.title: MacLéinn Archive
docs.text:
Independent, student-run documentation of Students’ Unions across Ireland.

This project is not affiliated with any university or students’ union.

Please see the side-bar to start your browsing.

docs.title: Contact & Corrections
docs.text:
This project aims to present factual, neutral, and accurate information.

If you believe any content is incorrect, outdated, or incomplete, please contact:

macleinnarchive@proton.me

Requests should include: - The page URL - The specific information in question - A source or explanation where possible

All reasonable correction requests will be reviewed.

docs.title: AMLÉ / USI Officer History
docs.text: A historical listing of Aontas na Mac Léinn in Éirinn (AMLÉ) and formerly the Union of Students in Ireland (USI) executive officers from 1959 to present.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
This record compiles the known executive officers of AMLÉ (formerly USI) from 1959 to present.

Sources: compiled from archived versions of usi.ie and amle.ie, Congress records, annual reports, student media, alumni input, and historical publications.

Note: Represents students in Northern Ireland and participates in AMLÉ/USI structures.

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• Years are academic years.
  • Records are based on available documentation.
  • AMLÉ was known as the Union of Students in Ireland (USI) until 2025.
  • Officer structures and titles have changed several times throughout the organisation's history.
  • Home Students' Union refers to the member students' union from which an officer was elected.
  • Corrections or additions are welcome.

docs.title: Trinity College Dublin Students' Union Officer History
docs.text: A historical listing of Trinity College Dublin Students' Union (Aontas Mac Léinn Choláiste na Tríonóide), often referred to by its abbreviation TCDSU/AMLCT, executive and representative officers from foundation to present.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
This record compiles the known executive officers of Trinity College Dublin Students' Union from foundation to present.

Sources: compiled from archived versions of tcdsu.org, Trinity College Dublin publications, student media, election records, alumni input, and TCDSU communications.

docs.title: CML OnG Officer History
docs.text: A historical listing of Comhaltas na Mac Léinn, Ollscoil na Gaillimhe (University of Galway SU) officers from 1964 to present.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
This record compiles the known executive officers of the Comhaltas na Mac Léinn, Ollscoil na Gaillimhe from 1964 to present.

Sources: compiled from archived versions of su.universityofgalway.ie, personal records, and alumni input.

docs.title: PSU/PSA Officer History
docs.text: A historical listing of UL Postgraduate Student Union, formerly UL Postgraduate Student Association, full time officers from 2002 to present.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
This record compiles the known officers of the Postgraduate Students’ Union and its predecessors (PSA) from 2002 to present.

Sources: compiled from archived versions of personal records, UL PSU communications, and alumni input.

docs.title: ULSL/ULSU Officer History
docs.text: A historical listing of UL Students' Union and Student Life executive officers from 1972 to present.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
This record compiles the known executive officers of the University of Limerick Students’ Union and its successors (NIHE Limerick SU, ULSU, ULSL) from 1972 to present.

Sources: compiled from archived versions of ulsu.ie, ulwolves.ie, personal records, UL Student Life communications, and alumni input.
